evals.prompt: Analyze the Page Name dimension on the Adobe Store Prod data view. I want to see cardinality, distribution/skew, and any data quality issues. Generate an HTML dashboard.
evals.expected_output: Skill should: (1) call findDataViews, set data view, (2) find/describe the Page Name dimension, (3) run reports for cardinality and distribution, (4) search for error patterns like Unspecified/None/empty, (5) save analysis JSON, (6) run cja_dimension_analysis.py to generate HTML dashboard, (7) present report path and key findings summary.

evals.prompt: Compare the Marketing Channel and Device Type dimensions side by side. Show me cardinality and skew for both. Use the last 90 days on my main data view.
evals.expected_output: Skill should: (1) set up data view, (2) find/describe both dimensions, (3) run cardinality and distribution for each, (4) produce a comparison table showing both dimensions, (5) generate report highlighting skew differences and any HIGH cardinality dimensions.

evals.prompt: I think there are data quality issues in my Campaign ID dimension — lots of Unspecified values. Can you check and give me a markdown report?
evals.expected_output: Skill should: (1) set up data view, (2) find Campaign ID dimension, (3) specifically run Phase 5 (Data Quality) - searchDimensionItems for 'Unspecified', 'None', 'empty', etc., (4) compute missing data %, (5) generate markdown report with severity classification, (6) recommend action if severity is Warning or Critical.
